sources.title: The Second Sight - Double Vision (MYSTERY THRILLER with KIM CATTRELL Films German Complete 2023)

metadata.Plot: Jet is a man who has a paranormal ability since he was born. But it makes him a freak among his friends. But everything changes when Jet falls in love with a girl. He begins to use his ability to help her in a way that he shouldn't. And it leads Jets into a dark, unkind destiny.
metadata.Writer: Sukosin Akkrapat, Pornchai Hongrattanaporn, Kiatkamon Iamphungporn
metadata.Actors: Nawat Kulrattanarak, Yayaying Rhatha Phongam, Virapond Jirawetsuntorakul
